channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 17%.

item.title: BBC Politics: Healey quits as defence secretary amid military spending row
item.description: Healey quits as defence secretary amid military spending row

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer insists defence plan ‘will keep us safe’ after Healey resigns in protest over funding – UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham’s momentum builds in Makerfield as byelection nears
item.description: Burnham’s momentum builds in Makerfield as byelection nears

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Global wars, a depleted military and stubborn Labour MPs: Healey exposes Starmer’s perfect storm

item.title: Bloomberg.com: UK Defense Secretary’s Ugly Exit Shatters Starmer’s Legacy - Bloomberg.com

item.title: BBC Politics: Why defence funding deal offered to Healey wasn't enough to keep him
item.description: Why defence funding deal offered to Healey wasn't enough to keep him

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Absolutely rightX The Starmer defenders on here will go “you think he’s a disaster? But what about the last 14 years?” The reality is that bad prime ministers go in sequence because it takes a leader of real quality t...
item.description: Absolutely rightX The Starmer defenders on here will go “you think he’s a disaster? But what about the last 14 years?” The reality is that bad prime ministers go in sequence because it takes a leader of real quality t...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: John Healey resigns latest: Starmer government thrown into chaos as defence secretary quits over military spending
item.description: John Healey resigns latest: Starmer government thrown into chaos as defence secretary quits over military spending
